untranslatable_reason: Head-and-Shoulders pattern requires identifying 3 distinct peaks and 2 troughs with specific geometric relationships across multiple bars. This structural multi-bar pattern cannot be reliably expressed using single-bar or dual-bar indicator conditions. The neckline concept (dynamic support line) and the precise shoulder/head height relationships would require custom pattern recognition logic beyond standard indicator thresholds. Approximated with overbought/volume conditions as proxy for reversal setup.
